docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY VALDEZ, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT PERDOMO, RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, GUILLERMO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERDOMO, RENE $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,430.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GUILLERMO VALDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RENE PERDOMO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00- SERVED NOV-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERDOMO, RENE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
